title: 2. Needle ZhengJin (77.01) and ZhengZong (77.02)
text:
We have introduced this disease before. In Tung's acupuncture, ZhengJin and ZhengZong are the most frequently
used points. The two points are very good for the pain along the midline of the spinal vertebrae. In the fourteen
meridians, KunLun æ˜†ä»‘ is a very effective point, and it would be even better if RenZhong is added as it is the
point of Du meridian that is very effective for the pain of the spinal vertebrae. In severe case, bleeding WeiZhong
is always the best.
